description: User examines and interacts with the 'Filter Opportunities' modal to refine search results, scrolling through various filter categories.
frame_description: A modal titled 'Filter Opportunities' is overlaid on the Explore page, showing options for Task Type, Duration, Pay Rate, and Device.

description: User selects the 'Under 10 min' duration filter.
User scrolls down and then back up within the Filter Opportunities modal to view different filter sections.
User selects multiple task types: Survey, AI Interview, and Diary Study.
User selects the 'Mobile Only' device filter.
User clicks the 'Apply Filters' button to confirm their selections.
The filter modal closes and the Explore page updates to show 8 opportunities matching the selected filters, with filter chips visible at the top.
